titleStmt.title: SII 8.251: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 251. (A.R. No. 646 of 1902). ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE SAME MANDAPA.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . komāṟupaṉmar tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīkulacekaratevarkku yāṇṭu 4 10 4Āvatu paṅkuṉimātam
muṉṟāntiyati nāḷ rājentra coḻavaḷanāṭṭu puṟaṅkarampaināṭṭu Akaram brahmadeśa ttārum nāṭṭārum
Eḻuttu Innāṭṭu Uḻukuṭimakkaḷukku nāṟpattoṉṟāvatumutal kaṭamaiyum kūṭṭum vaṟkamuṅ koḷḷumpaṭi
kku Eḻupattoṉpatuvaḷanāṭṭup patiṉeṇpūmip pūmpukār kārāḷakaṟpakaccamaiya cakkaravattikaḷukkuk kalve
ṭṭikkuṭutta paricāvatu . kaḷappāḷ Akaram śrīcuttavalliccaruppetimaṅkalamum muṭivaḻaṅkucoḻaccaruppetimaṅ
kalamum 4 10 4- Āvatumutal koḷḷumpaṭi puṟakkaṭamai māttāl tarakukkum Orupū kuṭippaṟṟukkum Oru paṇamum maṟuvuk
kum kuṭikkaṭaiiṭṭukkum Araippaṇamum kūṭṭum vaṟkkattukku māk kalam puṟaveṭṭi koṭṭaikūli Uḷppaṭa kār
maṟuvum Orupū kuṭippaṟṟukkum māttāl kala nellum nel mutalāṉa nel lukkup piṭākaitoṟum kaivilai
ppaṭikku nāṭoṟum taraveḻutavum Ippaṭi celavāṉa paṇattukkup paṇa moṉṟukku nānāḻi nelThis word is expressed by a symbol.piṭittu kaṇakku
p pārkkavum kaṇikāṇi nilattukkup po l māttāl kaḻittu melvārattu kūṭṭi melvāranelp peruṅku
ṭikaḷ vilakkavum neṭṭāḷ Ūṇopātipaṭiyum 4 10 4Āvatuvarai kaṇakkup pārttu kaṭaiyttalaiy kaṅku kaṭṭāmal kaṇa
kkup pārttu ner kaiyiṭutaravum maṉaippaṇam māppaṇat taviravu māṇṭutoṟum vaikācimātatte nerkkaiyiṭu taravum
nāṭṭuccammātan taviravu maṭaippu cerātoḻiyavum paṭaiyilāṉavaḻi taṟuntā toḻiyavum Orutaṉ vakaiyum tuṇṭa
ttūrvakaiyum nāṇalūr vakaiyum varicaivaḻi nilattukkum vuḷḷiṭṭa nilattukkum kārukkum Orupūvukkum kuṭippaṟṟukku kuṭimai
kku māttāl Oru paṇam paṇamākak koḷḷavum maṟuvukkum kaṭaiyiṭṭukkum kuṭimaikku māttāl Araippaṇam koḷḷavum
ivai tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉāraṇappaṭṭar Eḻuttu tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉpaṭṭar Eḻuttu
perumpilmarutūr vakaikku 4 10 4vatu kārmutal varicaipaṭiyum puḷḷippaṭiyum melvāram mutalāṉa nellu
kku kalattukku nānāḻi nellu koḷḷap puṟakkaṭamaikku kārukkum Orupūvukkum māttāl Oru paṇaṅ koḷḷavum
maṟuvukkum kaṭaiyiṭṭukkum māttāl Araiyāka vatta paṇaṅ koḷḷa Arici Eṭutta Āḷukkuc cattam cilavu
Iṭavum paṭaiyilaāṉa Aḻikāṭṭaā toḻiya maṟṟuḷḷavai maṟṟuḷḷavakaikku Aṟṟapaṭi Ivai ciṅkappirāṉ
paṭṭar Eḻuttu . ciṅkappirāṉpaṭṭar kāṇittukai māppaṇam maṉaippaṇam vepaṇam pāṭṭam Eṟpeṟpaṭṭaṉavum tavira
tuṇṭattūr Aṅkarāyarpaṟṟum Āṉāṅkūr Uṭaiyārpaṟṟum 4 10 4 kārmutal koḷḷumpaṭi māttāl nilam koḷḷa kuṭimai paṇam taraku Oṉṟu
pacāṉam paṇam kaṇkāṇin nilattukku nālil Oṉṟu
nelk kūṭṭuvaṟkkamum mu koḷḷavum kāṇittukai kalamākak koḷḷavumThis portion is inserted in smaller characters below the line.Ippaṭi mutal kūṭṭiṉa nellukku vācikkuk kalattukku muṉṉā
ḻi nelluk kūṭṭikkoḷḷavum maṟuvu(m) morupūvum paṟṟāta nilattukku kaṇkāṇittu nālil Oṉṟu vāra(m) miṭavum Innila
ttukku kuṭimai kūṭṭuvaṉa taviravum kuṭiyuṭaṉpaṭa puḷḷi pātta nilattukkuc cettalaiyile puḷḷik kaiyiṭu Eḻuti varicaippaṭi
nilattukku varicai peci Aṭaiolai Eḻuti kuṟainta vūrkaḷ kuṭimaippaṇam kuṟaintapaṭi koḷḷa nāḷvaṭṭam kaivilai vi
ṟ(vi)ṟapaṭi tara veḻuti tara neṭṭāḷkūlik kuṭimakaṉ Ūṇopāti paṭa kiṭanta cikai Akattuṇṭam kaṭṭātoḻiya Āṇ
ṭutoṟum Āṉimātatte nerkkaiiṭu kuṭukka Ūrvaḻi vaḷaiyil puṇaikkoḷḷāp puṟappuṇaik koḷḷātoḻiya . Ippaṭi
kuṇṭur ciṅkapirāṉpaṭṭar Eḻuttu . śrīkṛṣṇa paṭṭar Eḻuttu . tiruvuṭaimarutuṭaiyāṉpaṭṭar Eḻuttu . Aṅkārāyar Eḻuttu . Āṉāṅkuṭaiyār Eḻuttu .
nattavakai kāṇittokai yuḷppaṭa Ūrkaḷ varicaippaṭiyum matippuppaṭiyum kaṇkāṇippaṭiyum melvāram mutalāṉa nellum
kūṭṭuvatukku māttālk kalamāka vanta nellum Ippaṭi mutalāṉa nellukku kalattukku muṉṉāḻiyāka vanta ne
lluṅ kūṭṭikkoḷḷa kārum Orupūvum payircceyta nilattukku kuṭimaikku mukkālāka vaṉta paṇam paṇamāka koḷḷavum cela
vukku kaivilai viṟṟapaṭiye nāḷvaṭṭam taravu kaiccāttum peṟavum Āṇṭutoṟum maṟutimuṟi peṟavum puṟappuṇaik koḷḷā
toḻiya Ūrcervaḷaiyil puṇaikkoḷḷa kuṭikkaṭaiyiṭu kaṭaiyiṭṭuppaṭi ceyya nikki niṉṟa Uvāti kaḻittu Ippaṭikku
ciṅkappirāṉpaṭṭar Eḻuttu . śrīkṛṣṇa paṭṭar Eḻuttu . Oṉpuṟai varatarājabha ṭṭar Eḻuttu . vikkiramapāṇṭiyap piramarāyar Eḻuttu . Iḷaiyacirāmapaṭṭar Eḻuttu . Erutūṉṟi varatarācapaṭṭar Eḻuttu .
maṉaivaṟkkavakai varicaippaṭi nilattukkum Uṭaṉvāram puḷḷipārtta nilattukku melvāramum(k) kuṭimaikku maāttāl kārum Orupūvu
kku m maṟuvukku māttāl Araippaṇamum kuṭikkaṭaiyiṭṭukku māttāl Araippaṇaṅ koḷḷavum . Ippaṭi vanta paṇattukku ne
mal paṇamāka koḷḷavum . kūṭṭum vaṟkkattukku māttāl kala nelluk koḷḷavum Ippaṭi mutalāṉa nellukku kalattu
kku nānāḻiyāka vanta nellu kūṭṭikkoḷḷavum . kārum maṟuvum Orupūvum kuṭi yuṭaṉpaṭāta nilattukku kaṇkāṇittu nālil Oruvāram vi
ṭavum Innilattukku kuṭimai kūṭṭuvatu taviravum . māppaṇam maṉaippaṇam paṇavaṭṭa mvelippaṇam nāṭṭucammātam
maṟṟum Eppeṟppaṭṭa vaṟkkan taviravum . kuṭiyuṭaṉpaṭa Uṭaṉvaāram(p) pātta nilattukku cettalaiile puḷḷittaravu Eḻuta
vum . kaivilai viṟṟapaṭi vilai pecit taraveḻutavum vitaimutaliṭṭatu mutalkoḷḷavum . Arici kuṟa veṇṭil kuṟuvār kūli cela
viṭavum Āṇṭutoṟum nerttaravu Eḻutavum . varicai nilattukku varicai peciyaṭaiyolai Eḻutavum . Ūrtoṟum vaḷaiyil pu
ṇaikkoḷḷavum puṟappuṇaik koḷḷātoḻiyavum . 4 10 4Āvatu kaṇakkuk kārvarai pārttu Eṟṟamuḷḷatu pacāṉatte cela
viṭavum neṭṭāḷttevai Ūṇopāti koḷḷavum kuṭikkaṭaiyiṭuppaṭi koḷḷa kuṭimaikku Araippaṇaṅ koḷḷa
kūṭṭuvaṟkan tavira . Ippaṭikku kuṇṭūr ciṅkappirāṉpaṭṭar Eḻuttu . Ivai śrīkṛṣṇa paṭṭar Eḻuttu . Ivai tiruvuṭaimarutuṭaiyāṉpaṭṭar Eḻut tu .
ṟkuṭippaṭṭar Eḻuttu . Ivai kaārāmpiceṭṭu ciraṅka Ivai nārāyaṇapaṭṭar Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 8.251 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
